fault_hypothesis: The expiration check on line 73 uses strict greater-than (`now > deadline`) instead of greater-than-or-equal (`now >= deadline`), so an entry is incorrectly returned as valid when `now == deadline`.

constraints.intent: When now equals the deadline the condition must be true so the expired branch is taken; strict > misses the equality case.
Verify the relationship between now and deadline__1 is correctly captured before the comparison; equality must not be silently excluded from the expired branch.
In the else branch (cache hit path) now must be strictly less than deadline; if now == deadline the else branch should not be reached.

spec.expr: not (now >= deadline__1 and __cbfl_result is not None and __cbfl_result != default)

constraints.intent: The function must never return the cached value when now has reached or passed the deadline.
